description_long: This is a single bed frame with a classic, paneled design, featuring a tall headboard and a shorter footboard, both topped with a contrasting wood finish. The frame is painted in a light gray or off-white color, giving it a clean and modern appearance suitable for urban interiors or outdoor settings like patios or porches. The bed's base consists of evenly spaced wooden slats, providing support for a mattress. The legs are slightly tapered, adding a touch of elegance and stability. The headboard and footboard have recessed panel detailing, enhancing the traditional aesthetic. No mattress or bedding is present, leaving the slatted support structure fully visible.
description: A light gray paneled bed frame with a wood-topped headboard and footboard, featuring exposed wooden slats and a classic, elegant design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the tall headboard, short footboard, and the full length of the slatted base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the bed, the slatted support, and the panel details on the frame.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the back of the headboard and footboard, with the wood trim clearly visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same slatted base and panel details, mirroring the other side.
